commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a one-shot suppress-prompt-hook retry for PI runner context-overflow recovery, expands context-window stop-reason normalization tests, and changes Google Chat/memory-core peer metadata plus the lockfile.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: on current main, a mocked runEmbeddedAttempt returning context overflow with failed compaction and no oversized tool results reaches context_overflow directly in src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.ts. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
